text:
The local authority’s request for an urgent hearing to consider an interim care order and removal is refused as the court is not satisfied that sufficient evidence of urgency has been shown [and the application to abridge time for service is refused].

Time for service of notice of the proceedings is [not] reduced from 3 days to [period] because [insert].

There will be an [interim care] / [urgent case management] hearing at The Family Court sitting at [court name] on [date] at [time] allowing [hours/days]. The parties and advocates shall attend 1 hour prior to the listed time for pre-hearing discussions.
